findings.message: Function 'SayHello' has 2 return statements; MISRA Rule 6-6-5 requires a single exit point
findings.suggestion: Restructure function so all exit paths go through a single return

findings.message: Variable 'builder' of type 'int' declared without an initializer
findings.suggestion: Initialize 'builder' at the point of declaration

findings.message: Raw 'new' expression detected; prefer std::make_unique or std::make_shared
findings.suggestion: Replace 'new T(...)' with 'std::make_unique<T>(...)'

findings.message: Explicit 'delete' detected; prefer smart pointers for automatic lifetime management
findings.suggestion: Use std::unique_ptr or std::shared_ptr to avoid manual delete

findings.message: C-style array parameter 'argv' decays to a raw pointer with no bounds information
findings.suggestion: Replace C-style array parameter with std::span<T> or std::vector<T>

findings.message: C-style cast bypasses C++ type-safety checks
findings.suggestion: Replace with static_cast<T>, dynamic_cast<T>, or reinterpret_cast<T>

findings.message: String literal contains 6 escape sequences; consider a raw string literal for readability
findings.suggestion: Replace escaped string with R"(...)" raw string literal

findings.message: Index-based for loop may be replaceable with a range-based for loop
findings.suggestion: Consider 'for (const auto& elem : container)' instead

findings.message: Unscoped enum 'CallStatus' pollutes the enclosing namespace and allows implicit integer conversion
findings.suggestion: Replace 'enum CallStatus' with 'enum class CallStatus'

findings.message: Function 'RecordRoute' is 82 lines long (threshold: warning>80, error>150)
findings.suggestion: Decompose into smaller helper functions

findings.message: typedef 'grpc_byte_buffer_reader' should use a C++11 type alias instead
findings.suggestion: Replace 'typedef struct grpc_byte_buffer_reader grpc_byte_buffer_reader' with 'using grpc_byte_buffer_reader = struct grpc_byte_buffer_reader'

findings.message: Union 'grpc_byte_buffer_reader_current' allows type punning and violates MISRA C++ type safety rules
findings.suggestion: Replace union with std::variant for type-safe discriminated unions

findings.message: Deprecated C header <stdlib.h> included; prefer the C++ equivalent
findings.suggestion: Replace <stdlib.h> with <cstdlib>

findings.message: Function 'grpc_tls_certificate_verifier_verify' has 6 parameters (threshold: warning>5, error>8)

findings.message: Function 'PrintHeaderClientMethodInterfaces' has cyclomatic complexity of 18 (threshold: warning>15, error>25)
findings.suggestion: Decompose into smaller functions to reduce complexity

findings.message: NULL macro used as null pointer constant; prefer nullptr
findings.suggestion: Replace NULL with nullptr

findings.message: goto statement violates MISRA C++ Rule 6-6-2 (no goto)
findings.suggestion: Replace goto with structured control flow (loops, exceptions, or early return)

findings.message: Virtual method 'MakeOwningWaker' overrides a base class method but is missing the 'override' specifier
findings.suggestion: Add 'override' to the method declaration

findings.message: Dynamic allocation via 'realloc()' violates MISRA C++ Rule 18-4-1 (no dynamic heap allocation)
findings.suggestion: Use stack allocation, std::array, or a pre-allocated memory pool

findings.message: Function 'GetBelow' is recursive, making stack depth analysis impossible
findings.suggestion: Replace recursive implementation with an iterative one
